arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal latest with Gunners prepared to spend BIG on forward in January
arts.sum: Arsenal are desperate to sign a new striker this month following Gabriel Jesus' injury, with club chiefs now sanctioning a major spending spree for the final weeks of the window

arts.ttl: Wolves determined to keep Matheus Cunha at the club amid transfer interest
arts.sum: The 25-year-old has been a standout performer for Wolves in a miserable season.

arts.sum: The striker has reportedly told Wolves he wants to leave this month

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal in Pole Position to Sign Matheus Cunha From Wolves
arts.sum: Arsenal are the frontrunners to sign Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha, who is wanted by six Premier League clubs.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest transfer news: Wolves star Matheus Cunha made 'top target' for January window
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest allegedly make one of Wolverhampton Wanderers' star men their top target for the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal latest: Wolves manager Vitor Pereira slams striker's "body language' amid transfer links
arts.sum: Wolves boss Vitor Pereira criticises star striker Matheus Cunha's "body language" amid transfer speculation linking him to Arsenal and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Report: The maximum amount of money Arsenal are ready to pay Wolves to sign Matheus Cunha
How Arsenal would line up with Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Ben White is the club’s preferred right-back when fully fit, with William Saliba, Gabriel Magalhaes and Jurrien Timber also favoured by Mikel Arteta. Arsenal’s lack of a No.10 means the midfield trio of Martin Odegaard, Declan Rice and Thomas Partey will remain untouched, while Cunha will be deployed in an attacking role.
